pages.title: I Won’t Be Your Fire (Japanese Mix)
pages.tagline: Resist the flame. Preserve your peace.

pages.body: This atmospheric ballad weaves warm F# major synth pads with melancholic acoustic guitar and deep 808 bass to craft a cinematic soundscape supporting emotive vocals about resisting destructive passion. The narrator sets firm boundaries against volatile love cycles, choosing self-preservation over toxic dependency. Intimate and breathy, the track guides you through a journey of emotional burnout toward gentle acceptance of leaving for peace. It is a resolute refusal to become another's fuel in the long night.
pages.styleSentence: A mid-tempo (86 BPM) atmospheric ballad blending warm F# major synth pads with melancholic acoustic guitar and deep 808 bass, creating a cinematic soundscape that supports emotive vocals about resisting destructive passion.

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Cuts through the haze with intimate resolve.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Weaves harmony to soften the storm's edge.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps time steady beneath emotional tremors.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Adds subtle texture without overwhelming silence.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Anchors the track in deep, resolute lows.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Paints warm atmospheric pads for contemplation.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Layers ambient depth around vocal whispers.

members.name: GUITAR
members.bio: Plays soft acoustic lines with gentle regret.

members.name: KEYS
members.bio: Adds cinematic resonance to every bridge.

levels.name: DEFIANT RESOLVE
levels.emotion: Defiant resolve to end the cycle

levels.name: DARKNESS CHECKPOINT
levels.emotion: Desperate need for proof of existence in darkness

levels.name: CALM DETERMINATION
levels.emotion: Calm determination to stop the fire

levels.name: NIGHT NOISE RISE
levels.emotion: Rising tension against the noise of night

levels.name: GENTLE ACCEPTANCE PATH
levels.emotion: Gentle acceptance of leaving for peace

levels.name: LINGERING LIGHT EXIT
levels.emotion: Soft hope and lingering light after the storm
